howItWorks.intro: This full moon paranormal calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Expected Random %
rules.formula: Expected% = Full Moon Days / Total Days × 100
rules.explanation: What percentage of reports you'd expect by random chance.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: Does the full moon increase paranormal activity?
faq.answer: Many investigators report more activity near full moons, though scientific evidence is limited.

faq.question: How long is the full moon period?
faq.answer: The full moon lasts about 1 day, but many count ±2 days for the 'full moon window'.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What total reports in period should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate total reports in period value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

faq.question: Can I use this calculator on my phone?
faq.answer: Yes, the Full Moon Paranormal Calculator is fully responsive and works on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop. No app download needed.

sections.title: What Is the Full Moon Paranormal Calculator?
sections.body: The Full Moon Paranormal Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your total reports in period, reports during full moon, days in study period, you get instant results including expected full moon reports, actual full moon reports, correlation. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting expected full moon reports right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct.
